regions.text: Men living in America were named Indians by Columbus because he thought he had got to India when he discovered America. He went back to Spain without knowing that he had found a new continent.
He knew nothing of the life in North and South America or of the Aztecs and the Incas. It is now thought that in 1500 the population was about 30 million, and that they had come from Asia.

There may have been a land bridge between Asia and Alaska across which they could have come. continent: Europe, Asia, Africa, North America, South America, Australia and Antarctica are the continents.
it is now thought: scientists now think.
